name: Biluo Story
short_description: This is an independent game developed by one person over a period of 10 years. The new version of the game integrates tower defense, planting, fishing, hunting, construction, research and development, siege and many other gameplay modes.
detailed_description:
This is an independent game developed by one person over a period of 10 years. The game was developed in 2014 and a pre-sale version was released in 2018. However, due to poor reviews, the developers made significant modifications to the game. It was not until 2024 that the modifications were mostly completed and the latest version was released.

The new version of the game integrates tower defense, planting, fishing, hunting, construction, research and development, siege and many other gameplay modes. Players can freely recruit heroes, form teams, explore continuously in the game, use intelligence to decrypt, obtain rewards, upgrade and cultivate skills, reasonably match skills, enhance their own abilities, defeat enemies, protect princesses, and adopt a half turn combat mode.

The game features various terrains such as forests, snow, deserts, and volcanic eruption zones. Players can freely choose their favorite terrain as their birthplace and embark on adventures!

The game is available in both Chinese and English versions.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
